_comment: BPscript tunings — concrete scales linking alphabet to temperament.
degrees      — which steps in the temperament grid the alphabet notes land on
(ordered to match the notes[] array in the alphabet)
alterations  — named pitch modifications as ratios (fraction, decimal, or cents)
Legacy BP3 scales are preserved in tuning.json for backward compatibility.

L'ANCRE (diapason/baseNote/baseRegister) vit sur l'ALPHABET (lib/alphabets.json), pas ici — elle est invariante par alphabet (cf. docs/design/SCENE_DEFAULTS_CASCADE.md). Un accordage ne la redeclare qu'en override exceptionnel (pitch historique).

western_pythagorean.description: Western in Pythagorean tuning — pure fifths

sargam_12TET._note: diapason (Hz) for sa is tradition-dependent. 240 Hz is a common default.

sargam_22shruti.description: Indian sargam in 22-shruti system — full microtonal resolution
_note_on_alterations: In 22-shruti, komal/tivra shift by ~2 shruti steps but the exact ratio
depends on which note is altered. These ratios are representative defaults.
Raga-specific tunings may override with exact shruti positions.

arabic_24TET._note: husayni (6e degré, ancien 'la') ancré à 440 Hz — référence A440 inchangée, alphabet en noms de perde.

turkish_53TET._note: degrees[] maps the 16 named notes to their comma positions. Turkish system is complex with many more named pitches.

gamelan_pelog._note: Gamelan tunings are ensemble-specific. These are representative Central Javanese values.

gamelan_slendro.description: Javanese gamelan slendro — 5-tone near-equal, stretched octave

bohlen_pierce_just.description: Bohlen-Pierce just — 13 tones in a tritave (3:1)

bohlen_pierce_equal.description: Bohlen-Pierce equal — 13 equal divisions of the tritave

_comment_directional: === DIRECTIONAL SCALES === Different ascending/descending (ragas, some maqams).

raga_bhairav.description: Raga Bhairav — aroha et avaroha différents. komal re et dha à la montée, shuddh à la descente.

raga_yaman.description: Raga Yaman (Kalyan) — ma tivra à la montée, shuddh à la descente dans certaines interprétations

_comment_parametric: === PARAMETRIC TUNINGS (Dynamic Tonality) === degrees = generator counts, not step indices.

western_meantone_dt.description: Western diatonic in meantone continuum — generator morphable in real-time
western_meantone_dt._degrees_explained: C=0g, D=2g, E=4g, F=-1g, G=1g, A=3g, B=5g (chain of fifths)

sargam_meantone_dt.description: Indian sargam in meantone continuum — same mapping as western, different names
sargam_meantone_dt._degrees_explained: sa=0g, re=2g, ga=4g, ma=-1g, pa=1g, dha=3g, ni=5g
